reference: Hi, my thirteen-year-old daughter has a pulling sensation just below her belly button. She has experienced this intermittently for a while, lasting about half an hour each time. Since Sunday, it has returned and remained; the sensation is worsening and has spread up to her chest. Please help.
text: Hi, my thirteen-year-old daughter has a pulling sensation just below her belly button. She has experienced this intermittently for a while, lasting about half an hour each time. Since Sunday, it has returned and remained. The sensation is worsening and has spread up to her chest. Please help.
